tasks.subject: [question-prompt-redesign] [P4] Rewrite ToolApproval approved/denied states to compact single-row pattern
tasks.description:
Rewrite the decided (approved/denied) state in `apps/client/src/layers/features/chat/ui/ToolApproval.tsx` to match the ToolCallCard compact single-row pattern: `shadow-msg-tool`, `py-1`, status icon + mono tool name + status badge, neutral `bg-muted/50` background. ## Current Decided State (lines 162-181) ```tsx if (decided) { return (
{toolName} {decided === 'approved' ? 'Approved' : 'Denied'} {decided === 'denied' && timedOut.current && (

Auto-denied — approval timed out after {Math.ceil((timeoutMs ?? 0) / 60000)} minutes. The agent continued without this tool.

)}
); } ``` ## New Decided State Replace the decided state block with: ```tsx if (decided) { const isApproved = decided === 'approved'; return (
{isApproved ? ( ) : ( )} {toolName} {isApproved ? 'Approved' : 'Denied'}
{decided === 'denied' && timedOut.current && (

Auto-denied — approval timed out after {Math.ceil((timeoutMs ?? 0) / 60000)} minutes. The agent continued without this tool.

)}
); } ``` ## Key Changes from Current 1. **Background**: `bg-muted/50` (neutral) instead of `approvalState({ state: ... })` which applied status-tinted backgrounds (`bg-status-success-bg` for approved, `bg-status-error-bg` for denied). The status color is now only on the icon and badge. 2. **Shadow**: Added `shadow-msg-tool` to match ToolCallCard. 3. **Padding**: `py-1` instead of `py-2` for compact row. 4. **Transition**: `transition-all duration-150` instead of `transition-colors duration-200`. 5. **Status icon**: Added `Check` icon (green) for approved, `X` icon (red) for denied. Previously there was no icon. 6. **Icon size**: `size-(--size-icon-sm)` for compact row consistency. 7. **Tool name**: Added `text-3xs` class to match ToolCallCard's tool name styling. 8. **Status badge**: Changed from plain `` to a rounded pill badge with status-colored background: `rounded-full px-1.5 py-0.5 text-2xs font-medium` with `bg-status-success-bg text-status-success-fg` (approved) or `bg-status-error-bg text-status-error-fg` (denied). 9. **Layout**: Wrapped in `flex items-center gap-2` for proper single-row alignment. 10. **Auto-denied message**: Kept as-is (still shows below the compact row when applicable). ## Import Check The `Check` and `X` icons are already imported at the top of `ToolApproval.tsx` (line 2). The `approvalState` import can remain since it is still used for the pending state. The `cn` import is already present. ## TV Variant Note The `approvalState` TV variant in `message-variants.ts` still has `approved` and `denied` states. These are no longer used by the decided rendering (which now uses inline neutral classes), but `pending` is still used. The `approved`/`denied` variants can be left in place for potential future use or removed in a cleanup pass. ## Acceptance Criteria - Approved state renders as compact single-row: green Check icon + mono tool name + "Approved" badge - Denied state renders as compact single-row: red X icon + mono tool name + "Denied" badge - Background is `bg-muted/50` for both (no status-tinted backgrounds) - Shadow is `shadow-msg-tool` for both - Padding is `py-1` for both - Transition is `transition-all duration-150` - Tool name uses `font-mono text-3xs` - Status badges use rounded-full pill styling with appropriate status colors - Check icon uses `text-status-success`, X icon uses `text-status-error` - Auto-denied timeout message still appears below the row when applicable - `data-testid="tool-approval-decided"` and `data-decision` attributes preserved - TypeScript compilation succeeds
tasks.activeForm: Rewriting ToolApproval approved/denied states to compact single-row pattern

tasks.subject: [question-prompt-redesign] [P4] Update ToolApproval pending state buttons to use shared Button component
tasks.description:
Replace the raw ` ``` ## New Pending State Buttons Replace with: ```tsx
``` ## Import Update Add `Button` to the imports from `@/layers/shared/ui`. The current import line (line 5) is: ```tsx import { Kbd } from '@/layers/shared/ui'; ``` Change to: ```tsx import { Kbd, Button } from '@/layers/shared/ui'; ``` ## Design Decisions - **Approve button**: Uses `Button size="sm"` with custom `bg-status-success text-white hover:bg-status-success/90` className override. This preserves the green color while getting the Button's base sizing, font, focus ring, and disabled states for free. - **Deny button**: Uses `Button size="sm" variant="destructive"`. The existing `destructive` variant already provides red background with white text, matching the current deny button appearance. This is more idiomatic than using a className override. - **Responsive sizing**: The Button component has built-in responsive scaling (h-10 on mobile, h-8 on md+) via the `responsive` prop (default true). This replaces the manual `max-md:py-2` class that was on the raw buttons. ## Acceptance Criteria - Approve button uses `

tasks.subject: [question-prompt-redesign] [P6] Visual verification of all compact final states in dev playground
tasks.description:
Verify that the QuestionPrompt submitted state, ToolApproval approved/denied states, and ToolApproval pending buttons all render correctly and consistently with ToolCallCard in the dev playground.

## Verification Checklist

### 1. Start the dev server

```bash
pnpm dev
```

Open `http://localhost:4241/dev` in the browser.

### 2. QuestionPrompt submitted state

Navigate to the message showcases that include question prompts. Submit a question and verify:

- [ ] Compact single-row layout: check icon + text on one line
- [ ] `bg-muted/50` neutral background (no green tint)
- [ ] `shadow-msg-tool` subtle shadow present
- [ ] `py-1` compact padding (should match ToolCallCard row height)
- [ ] `rounded-msg-tool` border radius
- [ ] Green check icon (`text-status-success`)
- [ ] Single-question shows `header: value` format
- [ ] Multi-question shows `N questions answered`
- [ ] Consistent with ToolCallCard collapsed row appearance

### 3. ToolApproval approved/denied states

Find tool approval showcases or trigger a tool approval flow. Verify:

- [ ] Approved: green Check icon + mono tool name + "Approved" green pill badge
- [ ] Denied: red X icon + mono tool name + "Denied" red pill badge
- [ ] Both use `bg-muted/50` neutral background (no status-tinted background)
- [ ] Both have `shadow-msg-tool`
- [ ] Both have `py-1` compact padding
- [ ] Auto-denied timeout message still renders below the row when applicable
- [ ] Consistent with ToolCallCard collapsed row appearance

### 4. ToolApproval pending state buttons

Verify the pending state:

- [ ] Approve button uses shared Button component styling (consistent border-radius, focus ring)
- [ ] Deny button uses destructive variant styling
- [ ] Buttons are responsive (taller on mobile, compact on desktop)
- [ ] Kbd hints (Enter/Esc) render inside buttons when active
- [ ] Disabled state works during response

### 5. Cross-component consistency

Compare side-by-side:

- [ ] ToolCallCard completed row vs QuestionPrompt submitted row: same height, shadow, background, padding
- [ ] ToolCallCard completed row vs ToolApproval approved row: same height, shadow, background, padding
- [ ] All three use `rounded-msg-tool`, `shadow-msg-tool`, `bg-muted/50`, `py-1`, `transition-all duration-150`

### 6. Dark mode

Toggle to dark mode and verify all of the above still renders correctly.

## Acceptance Criteria

- All compact final states visually match ToolCallCard's collapsed row pattern
- Neutral `bg-muted/50` background across all final states (no status-tinted backgrounds)
- Shadow `shadow-msg-tool` present on all final states
- Status colors only on icons and badges, not on container backgrounds
- Dark mode renders correctly
- No console errors or warnings
tasks.activeForm: Verifying all compact final states in dev playground
